name: Ubiquiti Camera G5 Pro
title: Ubiquiti Camera G5 Pro
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Camera G5 Professional – 4K Security Camera with UniFi Protect
short_description: 4K Indoor/Outdoor IP Camera, 3840x2160 at 30 FPS, 3x Optical Zoom, 1/2" 8MP sensor, Built-in Microphone
description: 4K Indoor/Outdoor IP Camera, 3840x2160 at 30 FPS, 3x Optical Zoom, 1/2" 8MP sensor, Built-in Microphone

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Surveillance
detailed_description.text: Meet the UVC-G5-Pro, a cutting-edge 4K PoE Camera designed for both indoor and outdoor surveillance. This sophisticated camera raises the bar with its improved low-light performance and enhanced image dynamic range, ensuring optimal monitoring capabilities in various environments. The standout feature of the UVC-G5-Pro is its remarkable 4K (8MP) video resolution. With a capacity to capture footage at 3840 x 2160 pixels, this camera delivers unparalleled clarity and detail. This heightened resolution is a game-changer, allowing for precise identification of objects and individuals within its expansive field of view. Whether deployed in commercial spaces, public areas, or critical infrastructure, the 4K resolution ensures that every nuance is captured with exceptional precision.

detailed_description.heading: Broad Night Vision Range
detailed_description.text: In low-light conditions or complete darkness, the UVC-G5-Pro shines with its 25 m (82 ft) IR night vision capability. Advanced infrared (IR) technology provides an extensive night vision range, ensuring visibility and clarity around the clock. This feature is especially valuable for outdoor surveillance, where maintaining effective monitoring capabilities in various lighting conditions is paramount. Versatility is at the core of the UVC-G5-Pro, thanks to its 3x optical zoom with an IR cut filter. This feature allows dynamic adjustments to the camera's focal length, offering flexibility in capturing scenes at varying distances. The IR cut filter ensures accurate color reproduction during daylight and seamless transitions between day and night modes. This adaptability proves beneficial in scenarios that require both close-up scrutiny and long-distance monitoring.

detailed_description.heading: Application Versatility
detailed_description.text: The heart of the UVC-G5-Pro lies in its 1/2" 8MP sensor. This large sensor size elevates sensitivity to light, contributing to superior low-light performance and an enhanced dynamic range. The result is a camera that excels in diverse lighting conditions, delivering consistent and reliable performance. Complementing its powerful sensor is the high-quality lens with a variable focal length (F 4.1 - 12.3 mm) and aperture (f/1.53 – f/3.3). This lens configuration provides a wide horizontal field of view (109.9°) and a slightly narrower vertical field of view (60°). The flexibility inherent in this lens allows the UVC-G5-Pro to adapt to different surveillance scenarios, ensuring optimal coverage. Adding an auditory dimension to surveillance, the UVC-G5-Pro comes equipped with a built-in microphone. This feature captures sound along with high-quality video, enhancing the overall surveillance experience. Applications that demand audio monitoring, such as retail environments, residential security, or areas requiring comprehensive audio-visual surveillance, benefit significantly from this inclusion.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Outdoor Monitoring
detailed_description.text: The G5 Pro camera boasts an impressive IP65 rating, emphasizing its robust design and resilience in challenging environmental conditions. This Ingress Protection (IP) rating signifies that the camera is well-protected against dust and water ingress. With a dust-tight enclosure, the camera remains unaffected by the intrusion of solid particles, ensuring consistent performance in dusty environments. Additionally, the IP65 rating certifies the camera's ability to withstand water projected from a nozzle. This feature makes the G5 Pro camera ideal for outdoor installations, providing reliable surveillance in various weather conditions, including rain and exposure to splashes. Operating seamlessly across a temperature range of -20 °C to 50 °C, the camera showcases versatility in deployment. With the ability to function efficiently in both cold winters and hot summers, it ensures year-round surveillance coverage. Under the hood, a dual-core Arm® Cortex®-A53 chip serves as the powerhouse, offering heightened processing capabilities. This architecture contributes to the camera's overall efficiency in video processing, analytics, and data management. This makes the UVC-G5-Pro a high-performance surveillance tool versatile enough for complex applications, including those requiring advanced video analytics and real-time processing.
